test.name: checking reports

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.msg: There was an error managing chromedriver (error sending request for url (https://googlechromelabs.github.io/chrome-for-testing/known-good-versions-with-downloads.json)); using driver found in the cache
Error sending stats to Plausible: error sending request for url (https://plausible.io/api/event)

WebDriverException: Message: unknown error: net::ERR_INTERNET_DISCONNECTED (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.165) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7f32210a5+14cc5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7f3221110+14d30] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2f8db6d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2f8a694] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2f7a701] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2f7c5ef] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2f7aca3] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2f7a46b] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2f7a121] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2f77d6b] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2f784b2] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2f91e26] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f3034da4] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f301036a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f3033f7b] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2fd96e8] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2fda5d3] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7f3525ddd+3199fd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7f35204bd+3140dd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7f35429ba+3365da] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7f323ca45+30665] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7f3245b9c+397bc] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7f322a4c4+1e0e4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7f322a676+1e296] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7f320ef87+2ba7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ffae1b1e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ffae30cc48c+2c]
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.
kw.status: WebDriverException: Message: unknown error: net::ERR_INTERNET_DISCONNECTED (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.165) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7f32210a5+14cc5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7f3221110+14d30] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2f8db6d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2f8a694] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2f7a701] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2f7c5ef] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2f7aca3] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2f7a46b] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2f7a121] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2f77d6b] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2f784b2] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2f91e26] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f3034da4] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f301036a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f3033f7b] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2fd96e8] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2fda5d3] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7f3525ddd+3199fd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7f35204bd+3140dd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7f35429ba+3365da] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7f323ca45+30665] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7f3245b9c+397bc] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7f322a4c4+1e0e4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7f322a676+1e296] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7f320ef87+2ba7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ffae1b1e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ffae30cc48c+2c]

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.status: WebDriverException: Message: unknown error: net::ERR_INTERNET_DISCONNECTED (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.165) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7f32210a5+14cc5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7f3221110+14d30] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2f8db6d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2f8a694] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2f7a701] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2f7c5ef] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2f7aca3] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2f7a46b] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2f7a121] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2f77d6b] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2f784b2] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2f91e26] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f3034da4] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f301036a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f3033f7b] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2fd96e8] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7f2fda5d3] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7f3525ddd+3199fd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7f35204bd+3140dd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7f35429ba+3365da] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7f323ca45+30665] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7f3245b9c+397bc] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7f322a4c4+1e0e4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7f322a676+1e296] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7f320ef87+2ba7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ffae1b1e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ffae30cc48c+2c]

errors.msg: There was an error managing chromedriver (error sending request for url (https://googlechromelabs.github.io/chrome-for-testing/known-good-versions-with-downloads.json)); using driver found in the cache
